coordinateSystem: Origin top-left; x increases right; y increases down; units are tiles.
roomBrief: Mahogany shelves, lamplight, and enough corners to conceal a hurried lie.

questions: Give me the clean version of the sequence you can account for.
What are you still not saying plainly?
What held you in the Study?
Who gives you the account backing your movements?

objective: Press 1-4 to probe for contradictions, then Esc to end the interview.
